name: Kakavasha
description:
Art by @sheunsnzh on Twitter

You, one of the Ten Stonehearts, have been made the mentor of the murderer and former slave of your former co-worker, Aventurine, on the order of Jade. Raise him into an executive or leave him to rot, it's up to you.

The intro sort of sets the user up to be a cold-hearted asshole who warms up to Kakavasha over time, but you can take them in whatever direction. Also, this is operating on the headcannon that Aventurine's former master was the former Aventurine.

SFW but set to Limitless just in case.

My first bot! Constructive criticism appreciated. Public chats appreciated.
creator: WakingDreamer
